descriptions.text: Aliens is an unreleased Sega Genesis game based on the movie of the same name. The game was set to be developed by Konami and was going to be a port of the arcade game, although never released for unknown reasons.

Alien most commonly refers to: 

Extraterrestrial life, or alien life which does not originate from Earth
Extraterrestrial intelligence, hypothetical advanced alien life
Alien (law), a person in a country who is not a national of that country
Alien(s) or The Alien(s) may also refer to:
